headline: Lennox Schedules Second Quarter Results
summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy-efficient building and home comfort solutions, will report second quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, July 29, 2026. An earnings conference call and webcast are scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. Central Time. CEO Alok Maskara and CFO Michael Quenzer will provide a summary of the company's financial results and outlook, followed by a question-and-answer session.
